name: Sunsweet Public Company Limited
summary: Sunsweet Public Company Limited, through its subsidiary, SunSweet International Co., Ltd., manufactures and distributes agricultural products under the KC brand in Thailand. It offers fresh and processed fruits and vegetables; canned, pouch, and frozen sweet corns; white beans in tomato sauce; frozen green soybean; and other by-products, such as corn husk and maize. The company also sources and sells fresh onion, ketchup, canned pineapple, white sugar, fresh coconut, tapioca starch, jasmine rice, dressing, etc., as well as corn, soybean, and sunflower oil. It also exports its products to Japan, Korea, Taiwan, Russia, Saudi Arabia, Switzerland, Germany, Lebanon, Turkey, Iran, and internationally. The company was founded in 1991 and is headquartered in Chiang Mai, Thailand.
